temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) In a dimly lit, dark room, a man in a blue denim shirt looks down with a somber and troubled expression. He is sweating, and his face is partially obscured by shadows. A voice off-screen asks him a question. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense interrogation. The man, Ah Xiao, is being questioned by an unseen person, setting a confrontational and serious tone.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: The off-screen voice is calm and questioning. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous hum is audible in the background.)
(00:06-00:11) The man, Ah Xiao, remains silent and avoids the question. He keeps his head bowed, his face still shrouded in shadow, emphasizing his reluctance to speak. (Storyline: Ah Xiao's refusal to speak heightens the tension of the interrogation, suggesting he is either intimidated or determined to remain silent.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The low, ominous hum continues.)
